objective: rfa CLI gains mutation commands. Full parity with topology UI ops.
in_scope: All mutations emit rafka.cli.command + nested rafka.cli.http.request spans
exit_criteria: rfa mesh node add --type broker --name br-test → broker appears in UI within 5s
rfa mesh node remove br-test → removed within 10s
rfa mesh wait-converged --timeout 30s exits 0 after spawning 4 nodes
UI and CLI driving the same backend — no state drift
Jaeger URL showing CLI-driven mutation chain (cli.command → ui.api.spawn_requested → subprocess.spawned → node.ready)
